message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User
participant JobManager
participant Nodes
participant ESDM
participant "Post Processing Library" as PPL
database Storage

User -> JobManager : submit job(IN, OUT)

== Initialization ==

Nodes -> Storage : read IN=x
Storage --> Nodes : return

== Loop ==

Nodes -> Nodes : compute
Nodes -> ESDM : write async OUT=y
ESDM -> Storage : write snapshot (async)
ESDM -> PPL : trigger post processing if region effected

group In Situ Post Processing
    PPL -> PPL : perform post processing
    PPL -> Storage : (could write result directly)
    PPL --> ESDM : return
    ESDM -> Storage : write post processing result
end

ESDM --> Nodes : return
Nodes --> User : OUT files become visible

note over ESDM : multiple iterations

== Finalize ==

Nodes --> User : All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.

@enduml
```
